Every day, we use different online tools to complete simple tasks like converting PDFs, compressing images, formatting JSON, checking SEO, counting words, or calculating percentages. The problem is that these tools are usually spread across different websites.
To solve this problem, I built I Love Tool XYZ, a free platform that brings all essential online tools together in one place.
🌐 Website: https://www.ilovetoolxyz.com
What is I Love Tool XYZ?
I Love Tool XYZ is a browser-based platform that offers more than 100 free online tools designed for students, developers, digital marketers, content creators, business professionals, and everyday users.
There is no software to install, and most tools work directly in your browser.
Categories Available
📄 PDF Tools
Merge, split, compress, rotate, convert, unlock, and organize PDF files with ease.
🖼 Image Tools
Compress, resize, crop, convert, and optimize images for websites and social media.
🔍 SEO Tools
Generate meta tags, analyze keywords, create robots.txt files, generate sitemap XML, and improve website optimization.
💻 Developer Tools
Format JSON, encode and decode Base64, convert colors, test regular expressions, beautify code, and more.
📝 Text Tools
Word counter, case converter, text formatter, remove duplicate lines, and many other utilities.
🧮 Online Calculators
Age Calculator, BMI Calculator, Percentage Calculator, GST Calculator, EMI Calculator, and many more.
Why Use Browser-Based Tools?

• No installation required

• Fast processing

• Mobile-friendly

• Privacy-focused

• Free to use

• Works on Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, and iPhone
Who Can Benefit?

• Students

• Developers

• Bloggers

• Digital Marketers

• Designers

• Business Owners

• Content Creators

• Freelancers
Our Mission
Our goal is simple: provide a growing collection of free, reliable, and easy-to-use online tools that save time and improve productivity for everyone.
We continuously add new tools and improve the platform based on user feedback.
Visit Today
